creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 238637
bugfix

In a game with 26 planes, the last one to be allocated wouldn't be allocated if it was the only eligible one.

This was fixed almost 12 years ago in NetBSD (see http://cvsweb.netbsd.org/bsdweb.cgi/src/games/atc/update.c?only_with_tag=MAIN#rev1.22)

The PORTREVISION bump might be somewhat excessive, but arguably the behaviour does change...
